query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A tight close-up of a humanoid face with blue skin, freckled cheeks, a straight nose, and large amber eyes with dark pupils staring directly forward. The ears protrude from the sides of the head, and bright frontal light illuminates the center of the face against a dark background. The top of the head and the mouth fall outside the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal, tightly cropped close-up of a humanoid face rendered with a sickly cyan-blue cast across the skin and ears. The obstructed framing aggressively cuts off the top of the head and the mouth, withholding key facial features at the edges. The figure has large amber eyes with dark pupils, a straight nose, and finely speckled skin, lit by bright frontal illumination that emphasizes the unnatural, dreamlike quality of the subject against a dark background.
